comment: Groups monitored checks into dashboard tabs. A check joins a company if its label or id contains any term in 'match' (case-insensitive). Any check that matches nothing becomes its own tab, named from its label. To fold a machine into a company, add an entry — e.g. { "label": "Schmidbauer", "match": ["schmidbauer", "baxley"] }. Edit and restart the app; no rebuild needed.
